content: In-app notification systems on Postgres are conventionally hand-rolled: a notifications table (user_id, type, title/body or structured payload, read boolean + read_at, created_at) with a composite index on (user_id, read, created_at), paginated via LIMIT/OFFSET or keyset pagination, exposed via GET list + unread-count + PATCH mark-read endpoints. No dominant npm library for this; PostgreSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY (pg-listen) is the native primitive for later push delivery.
